name: Oatmeal-Orange-Nut Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Place softened margarine, yogurt, sugar and vanilla into a mixing bowl.
2. Mix until well blended.
3. Add the remaining ingredients and blend well.
4. Use a teaspoon or small melon scoop to make rounded balls of dough.
5. Place 2 inches apart on an ungreased cookie sheet; flatten slightly with a fork dipped in flour or sugar.
6. Bake in a preheated oven at 325 degrees for 12-15 minutes.
7. Remove immediately from the cookie sheet and allow to cool on a wire rack.
